name: Dave Hughes
bio: Dave Hughes is an Australian stand-up comedian, radio host and television presenter known for his laconic drawl and observational, everyman style. He rose to national prominence in the 2000s through the ABC panel show The Glass House and breakfast radio, and has toured stand-up across Australia and internationally for three decades. He has also hosted or judged programs including The Project, Australias Got Talent and The Masked Singer Australia.

timeline.ev: Joins The Glass House on ABC
Joins Channel 10 panel show The Project
Judge on The Masked Singer Australia

accolades: Multiple Helpmann Award nominations for live comedy
Toured stand-up nationally for three decades
Invited to perform at Montreals Just For Laughs festival
